This script calculates descriptive statistics (mean ± SEM, median, SD, n) and assesses the normality of the distribution (Shapiro-Wilk test, histogram, QQ-plot) of the resting
membrane potential recorded from patched astrocytes in OHSC.


# load data
df   <- read.csv("Astrocyte_Resting_Membrane_Potential.csv")
data <- na.omit(df$I.0.Median)

# descriptive statistics
n      <- length(data)
sd_val <- sd(data)
sem    <- sd_val / sqrt(n)
sw     <- shapiro.test(data)

cat(sprintf("n          = %d\n",                    n))
cat(sprintf("Mean ± SEM = %.2f ± %.2f mV\n",       mean(data), sem))
cat(sprintf("Median     = %.1f mV\n",               median(data)))
cat(sprintf("SD         = %.2f mV\n",               sd_val))
cat(sprintf("Shapiro-Wilk: W = %.3f, p = %.3f\n",  sw$statistic, sw$p.value))

# normality plots
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
hist(data, freq = FALSE, breaks = 10, col = "steelblue", border = "white",
     main = "I=0 Median — Histogram", xlab = "V_rest (mV)", ylab = "Density")
qqnorm(data, main = "I=0 Median — QQ-Plot")
qqline(data, col = "red")
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
